arts.ttl: Maresca happy with Chelsea’s transfer business
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted he is happy with Chelsea’s business during the transfer window. There were a number of pre-deadline outgoings, with Ben Chilwell, Axel Disasi, Carney Chukwuemeka and Renato Veiga all leaving on loan, while Cesare Casadei was sold to Torino. As the deadline passed, it was also expected that Joao Felix’s loan move […] The post Maresca happy with Chelsea’s transfer business appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: 'Something special' – McCoist hails West Ham star after what he did v Chelsea
arts.sum: Jarrod Bowen gives West Ham United “something special” after scoring on his return to the side against Chelsea, Ally McCoist has said. Speaking on talkSPORT... The post 'Something special' – McCoist hails West Ham star after what he did v Chelsea appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca explains the main reason why win vs West Ham is 'huge' for Chelsea, 'it's not easy'
Gary Neville slams VAR's Chelsea decisions as two calls leave Graham Potter furious
arts.sum: Chelsea prevailed over West Ham in the Premier League but were perhaps fortunate that Pedro Neto's equalising goal was awarded at Stamford Bridge after a foul on Jarrod Bowen was overlooked

arts.ttl: Villa complete Axel Disasi loan signing
arts.sum: Aston Villa is delighted to announce the loan signing of Axel Disasi from Chelsea. The Frenchman joins Villa on a deal until the end of the season. Disasi has amassed over 300 senior club appearances as well as being capped five times at international level. The central defender has experience in the Champions League and has also represented his country at the FIFA World Cup. Welcome, Axel! 🇫🇷

arts.ttl: Graham Potter insists Chelsea got lucky for BOTH their goals as Blues come from behind to ruin West Ham boss' return to Stamford Bridge
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Graham Potter cursed his rotten luck on his Stamford Bridge return as he felt Chelsea relied on two fortunate goals to beat his West Ham side.

arts.ttl: PSG, Villa win transfer window; Man United, Arsenal biggest losers
arts.sum: Mark Ogden breaks down Marcus Rashford's loan move to Aston Villa from his boyhood club Manchester United. So, tipping them from losers to neutral was the deadline-day signing of Bayern forward Mathys Tel on loan, with an option to sign permanently in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Chukwuemeka leaves on loan, Amougou deal expected
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka moves to Borussia Dortmund on loan, while St Etienne's Mathis Amougou is set to join the Blues.

arts.ttl: Brighton striker Ferguson joins West Ham on loan
arts.sum: Brighton and Republic of Ireland striker Evan Ferguson joins West Ham on loan for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Graham Potter happy with 'significant' West Ham boost on transfer deadline day
arts.sum: Irons signed Evan Ferguson before recalling James Ward-Prowse
